channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Wed May 13: Quiet day for autonomy systems research insights.
item.description: Today's research highlights a focus on multimodal reasoning and efficient model architectures, but lacks strong connections to real-time inference for safety-critical applications. Notable works include 'Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers' and 'Automated multiphase identification and refinement in powder diffraction'.
